message:
fix(mux): fix split layout persistence and click-to-activate panels

- Add onActivate callback to Panel component for click-to-activate in splits
- Pass splitInfo when creating split panels so server adds to existing tab
  instead of creating new tabs
- Add initialLayoutLoaded store to prevent "No Open Tabs" flash during load
- Rewrite buildSplitTree/buildNestedSplit to properly handle nested splits
  with different directions (old code flattened structure and lost direction info)
